WEBSITE DATA SCRIPT
Hi, is that______? Hi (Name) it’s ________ from --------------, you helped out with an online survey back in
Month/ Year when you were on the ________website and we put you in a prize draw, do you remember
doing that?
Well I have some really great news for you, You been SELECTED to receive a fantastic (Android Tablet) as
part of a special promotion for our FREE Financial Fitness Pack - Now, do you have an Android tablet or
iPad yet?
NO – well now you do! 	YES – No worries, I’m sure someone you know would love this for a gift, or why
not own two! Tablet Specs – 7 inch, dual core, camera and video, and it even has a USB port, so you can
load up movies and games without having to download via the internet.
Great, now just to make sure you qualify for the Financial Fitness Pack, I need to confirm a couple of the
details you filled out on the entry form, so:
1. 	We’ve got your surname as ___________________ is that correct?
2. 	And it says here on the entry form that you OWN YOUR HOME (with a Mortgage), is that right?
3. 	And would you say that you’d have above or below $120,000 of equity in the home? And can I ask
what the
4. 	You ticked that your combined income is between/over $____annually, is that still correct?
5. 	And do you mind if I ask what you do for a living? Do you enjoy that? And can I ask what your partner
does for a living? And what was your partner’s name?
6. 	And Luck last what’s most important to you? 	Paying off your Mortgage - Paying less Tax - Or Saving for
Retirement?
• 	MORTGAGE: 	Great – well the presentation will cover How you can pay off your home in only half
the time and with interest rates at record lows it’s a great time to get stuck into paying off the
mortgage –isn’t it?
• 	TAX: 	Great – well the presentation will cover how you can get an extra $10,000 tax back in
your tax return – what would you spend the extra $10,000 on if you go it back in tax? 	(I’d
take a holiday myself ☺ )
• 	RETIREMENT: 	Great – well the presentation will cover how you can take advantage of some
new government tax incentives to set yourself up for retirement – and with super performing
dreadfully the last few years we all need to have our super do better, don’t we?
Great, well we might be able to show you how to make that happen, so congratulations, you qualify!!!
All we need to do now is organise a time to drop off that FREE TABLET and run through some great ways you
can;
• 	Pay your mortgage off in around half the time
• 	Reduce your Tax Bill by up to 50%
• 	Set yourself up for a comfortable retirement
Now we have your address here as _____ is that right?
Great, it will only take around 45 mins and we need both you and your partner need to be there to sign off
to receive the tablet, so when’s the best time to catch you and (partner) together, in the evening or during
the day?
OK now we’re actually in your area on ___or_____ which day would suit you best?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

And I’ve got one of our guys free at (times available) which is best for you?
Great, we look forward to seeing you then and please don’t worry, were not coming to sell you anything,
we’ll just cover some really great ideas and concepts with you on how you can (pay mort / tax / retire) and
if you’re interested then that’s fantastic, but if not, then that’s ok too, you still keep the lovely tablet FREE
on us, no strings attached.
Now just so we can have a tailored presentation for you on HOT BUTTON. Home value is? $_______ 	And do
you know what you have left owing to the bank?_________ and would you know how many years left on the
mortgage_________ and last one do you have any dependents?
Great that’s wonderful - Thanks and have a great day!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
